hypotheses.interpretation: Parameter-matched flat baseline is comparable, weakening the efficiency claim.
Terminal-only recursive thought generalizes better to deeper chains than the full baseline.
Auxiliary intermediate supervision does not materially improve OOD reasoning.
Annealing away the oracle signal loses most of the gain.
One-step retrieval is comparable, so recursion may not be the key factor on this task.
The advantage does not clearly survive harder structural variants.
